log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Aasimar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aasimar — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Aasimar — Bardic Musician HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 31 damage. Aasimar — Bardic Musician HP: 18/67
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Aasimar — Bardic Musician HP: 3/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aasimar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 3/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Aasimar — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aasimar — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Aasimar — Bardic Musician HP: -17/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!

══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aasimar — Bardic Musician --- HP: 6/67 | AC: 14 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! 4 psychic damage. HP: 174/178
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 174/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aasimar — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Aasimar — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Aasimar — Bardic Musician HP: -9/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!
══ ROUND 1 ══
